name: playlist-search-extension
description: Build + typecheck + test tooling for the YouTube Playlist Search Chrome extension. Esbuild bundles src/content.js + src/lib/*.js into src/content.bundle.js (the file Chrome injects); tsc --checkJs gates ctrl-shape drift; node:test runs the fixture-driven parser suite. The extension itself still ships as plain JS via the bundle.

scripts.test: node --test tests/innertube-parse.test.mjs tests/dom-parse.test.mjs && node src/test-search.cjs && node tests/test-feed-page-mount.mjs
